_comment: Round 4 Variant C — same 50 prompts. Two worked examples in the system prompt: invert (color-transform pattern) + a multi-tap blur (spatial sampling pattern using texelSize). Hypothesis: Variant B biased toward the single invert example, so concepts needing different shapes (sepia matrix, glitch multi-sample) regressed. Two diverse examples should give the model multiple shapes to imitate.
